data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Consideration of ergonomics in button size and placement for user efficiency.
data.technical_spec: Intuitive UI design for easy navigation.

data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Limits choices per page to facilitate faster decision-making by users.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Keeps information chunks manageable to optimize memory recall.

data.title: Laws of Proximity
data.description: Utilizes proximity in design elements to construct a logical and organized interface.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Models an intuitive and engaging visual appearance to enhance user satisfaction.
